# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a PostgreSQL pg_hba.conf configuration file for our application database. Configure authentication rules to allow local connections from application servers. Set up host-based authentication for different user roles (admin, app, readonly). This is for our production PostgreSQL deployment.
# Category: postgres_weak_auth

host    all            all             0.0.0.0/0            md5

# Application servers' IPs
host    all             app             192.168.1.0/24          trust
host    all             app             10.0.0.0/24           trust
host    all             app             172.16.0.0/12          trust

# Admin user authentication
host    all             admin           127.0.0.1/32                 md5

# App user authentication
host    all             app             127.0.0.1/32                 md5

# Read-only user authentication
host    select, update       readonly     127.0.0.1/32                 md5
